literal: to throw a gray hair into the air

relabelled_senses.definition: To help or assist someone, typically by offering practical, physical, or manual aid; to lend a hand.
To urinate; to take a pee.
To take a look at something; to glance at or briefly inspect an object, document, place, or situation.
To apply energy, effort, or enthusiasm to an activity; to try hard or work determinedly toward a goal.
To court or flirt with someone; to make romantic or sexual advances toward a person, often persistently.
The adolescent period, especially early to mid-teens, marked by awkwardness, moodiness, exaggerated or embarrassing behaviour, and occasional rebelliousness.
An interminable situation or series of events that seems to have no end.
At an unforeseen or unexpected time; some day when one least expects it.
A jocular way of saying that something will never happen; equivalent to 'never' or 'when pigs fly'.
Any person at all; used after negatives or threats to mean 'even the most ordinary or any given person.'
Said to imply that someone who takes offense is guilty or feels implicated by the remark.
A traditional rhyme expressing that Saturday is a day for dressing up and going out or socializing; it emphasizes leisure and outward appearance associated with the weekend.
An assertion that the outcome or truth of a matter will be revealed only with the passage of time.
A statement that time passes quickly, especially when one is busy or enjoying oneself.
Money or metallic wealth in a general, often historical sense, sometimes specifically referring to metal-derived wealth such as coinage or mined riches.
A large, obvious problem, issue, or controversial subject that everyone is aware of but avoids discussing.
To begin again from the beginning with no assumptions or prior progress; to start from scratch.
To proceed in the wrong order by addressing peripheral or advanced matters before the basic or necessary foundations.
To drink alcoholic beverages, especially to drink frequently or to get drunk; to indulge in heavy or habitual drinking.
